purpose: Record PR-132 C-rank recheck for France Galop, LeTROT, and FNCH. This file is not a calendar input.

source_rechecks.result: FNCH official calendar route is the strongest France C-rank candidate because it exposes date + hippodrome rows and period controls including Aujourd'hui, Cette semaine, and Ce mois-ci. However, the current capture only exposes 2026-06-02 rows and does not expose a complete June 2026 month table or reusable captured month endpoint. Do not promote.

France Galop navigation exposes Yesterday, Today, Tomorrow, Other dates, Pattern & Listed races, Group 1 races, and subscription routes. Other dates redirected to sign-in in the captured path, and no complete June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows were captured.
Calendar subscription page confirms a free calendar-subscription UI for all France, federation, and racecourse, but captured HTML does not expose a reusable ICS/API URL or complete June 2026 rows.
LeTROT home/courses routes expose current-day, tomorrow, and next-days meeting lists with racecourse names, but these are rolling short-window pages and are not a verified full June 2026 month route.
GNT route is accessible and snippets identify individual stages such as Laval on 2026-06-03 and Agen on 2026-06-17, but this is not complete LeTROT June 2026 C-rank coverage.

promotion_status.reason: France is not promoted to C-rank manual records because no captured official route currently provides complete June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows for France Galop and LeTROT. FNCH is promising but currently day-only in capture.

regeneration_method.current: Re-check FNCH calendar page and France Galop/LeTROT official routes. Only promote when a reusable month route or export exposes complete June 2026 date + racecourse rows.
regeneration_method.missing_for_promotion: Captured no-login month endpoint, export, ICS, or official PDF/API for June 2026 France Galop and LeTROT rows.

next_update_steps: Use browser/devtools or Codex network inspection to identify the request behind FNCH Ce mois-ci.
Inspect France Galop calendar subscription network calls for generated ICS/API URLs.
Inspect LeTROT courses/calendar-resultats routes for date/month parameters outside current rolling windows and GNT feature pages.
Do not promote daily FNCH rows, GNT snippets, or rolling-window pages as full-month C-rank coverage.
